message:
test: expand FABRIC integration, schedule promotion, golden fixtures, and scenario adapter coverage

tests/fabric_lab_integration.rs (+438 lines):
- Packet-plane publish/subscribe/cancel lifecycle under LabRuntime
  with wildcard and exact subject matching
- Request/reply round-trip with deterministic reply subject
- ShardedSublist routing: subscription creation, queue-group picks,
  shard assignment for exact vs wildcard patterns, guard drop cleanup
- SublistLinkCache integration: cache hit avoidance, stale generation
  invalidation, capacity eviction

tests/lab_differential_schedule_promotion.rs (+116 lines):
- Divergence corpus entry lifecycle: upsert, promote_to_regression,
  minimization lineage tracking
- DifferentialBundleArtifacts construction from promoted scenarios
- Obligation-leak semantics in promoted dual-run scenarios

tests/semantic_golden_fixture_validation.rs (+119 lines):
- Refactor: extract build_contract_identity/build_contract_scenario
- Scenario runner smoke: validate and execute a minimal contract scenario
- SporkScenarioRunner lab harness integration with identity round-trip
- ReproManifest golden fixture verification

tests/lab_live_scenario_adapter_contract.rs:
- Align seed plan with golden fixture (add live_override=99, entropy=777)
- Load golden harness fixture for assertion comparison
- Simplify assertion structure using fixture-based comparison

tests/fixtures/semantic_golden/dual_run_harness_contract.json:
- Updated golden fixture to match enriched seed plan and scenario structure

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -60,5 +60,38 @@
     "Seed lineage records explicit live overrides instead of hiding them",
     "Live current-thread provenance keeps the same surface contract as lab",
     "Explicit entropy overrides are retained in both replay metadata and seed lineage"
-  ]
+  ],
+  "smoke_snapshot": {
+    "scenario_id": "phase1.cancel.race.one_loser",
+    "surface_id": "cancel.race",
+    "surface_contract_version": "cancel.race.v1",
+    "seed_lineage_id": "seed.phase1.cancel.race.one_loser.v1",
+    "adapters": {
+      "lab": "lab.scenario_runner",
+      "spork": "lab.spork_harness",
+      "live": "live.current_thread"
+    },
+    "execution_instances": {
+      "lab": "phase1.cancel.race.one_loser:lab:0x2A:0",
+      "spork": "phase1.cancel.race.one_loser:lab:0x2A:0",
+      "live": "phase1.cancel.race.one_loser:live:0x63:0"
+    },
+    "passed": {
+      "lab": true,
+      "spork": true
+    }
+  },
+  "failure_manifest_excerpt": {
+    "scenario_id": "phase1.cancel.race.one_loser",
+    "adapter": "live.current_thread",
+    "surface_id": "cancel.race",
+    "surface_contract_version": "cancel.race.v1",
+    "seed_lineage_id": "seed.phase1.cancel.race.one_loser.v1",
+    "failure_reason": "contract smoke mismatch",
+    "phases_executed": [
+      "setup",
+      "execute",
+      "compare"
+    ]
+  }
 }
